Types

Board = object
  fqbn*, port*: string
BoardList = seq[DetectedPort]
DetectedPort = object
  port*: Port
  matching_boards*: Option[seq[MatchingBoard]]
MatchingBoard = object
  name*: string
  fqbn*: string
Port = object
  address*: string
  label*: string
  protocol*: string
  protocol_label*: string
  properties*: Table[string, string]
  hardware_id*: Option[string]

Procs

proc `$`(board: Board): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc `$`(boardList: BoardList): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc `$`(detectedPort: DetectedPort): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc coreFromFqbn(fqbn: string): string {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Extracts the core (platform) id from a fqbn. ex: "arduino:avr:uno" -> "arduino:avr" 
proc cpuFromFqbn(fqbn: string): string {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc createSketch(nimSrcFile: string; sketchDir, cpu: string = ""): string {.
    discardable, ...raises: [IOError, ValueError, OSError, CatchableError], tags: [
    ReadDirEffect, WriteDirEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect,
    ExecIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Creates a new sketch directory (+ ino stub file) if not provided, compiles the Nim code, and copies the generated files to the sketch directory. Returns full path to the sketch directory. If no cpu is provided, the cpu will attempt to be determined from the active board. 
proc ensureCoreInstalled(fqbn: string; autoInstall: bool = true) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, OSError, IOError, JsonParsingError, KeyError],
    tags: [ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Makes sure the core for the given fqbn is installed, installing it if allowed. 
proc getActiveBoard(): Board {....raises: [OSError, IOError, JsonParsingError,
                                        ValueError, KeyError, JsonKindError], tags: [
    ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc installCore(coreId: string) {....raises: [OSError, IOError], tags: [
    ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Installs a core (platform) via arduino-cli. Requires network access. 
proc installLib(lib: string) {....raises: [OSError, IOError],
                               tags: [ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect],
                               forbids: [].}
Installs an Arduino library by name. Supports versioned syntax (e.g. "Servo@1.2.1"). 
proc isCoreInstalled(coreId: string): bool {.
    ...raises: [OSError, IOError, JsonParsingError, ValueError, KeyError],
    tags: [ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc listBoards(): BoardList {....raises: [OSError, IOError, JsonParsingError,
                                        ValueError, KeyError, JsonKindError], tags: [
    ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc monitor(port: string = ""; baud: int = 9600) {....raises: [OSError, IOError,
    JsonParsingError, ValueError, KeyError, JsonKindError],
    tags: [ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Opens an interactive serial monitor on the given port at the given baud rate. Uses arduino-cli monitor under the hood — stdin/stdout are inherited so the user can interact in real time. Ctrl+C exits cleanly. 
proc searchLib(query: string) {....raises: [OSError, IOError, JsonParsingError,
    ValueError, KeyError], tags: [ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect,
                                  WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Searches the Arduino library index for libraries matching the query. Updates the library index first to ensure fresh results. 
proc upload(sketchDir, fqbn, port: string = ""; autoInstallCore: bool = true;
            verbose: bool = false) {....raises: [OSError, IOError, CatchableError,
    ValueError, JsonParsingError, KeyError], tags: [ReadDirEffect, ExecIOEffect,
    ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
